name: setFlagShow
description: Shows or hides all sky background images (deep-sky textures, DSS images, etc.).

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: `true` to show sky layers, `false` to hide.

alternative: Use `core.getStelProperty('StelSkyLayerMgr.flagShow')` to read the current state.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getFlagShow
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. It may not work reliably in scripts. Use `core.getStelProperty('StelSkyLayerMgr.flagShow')` instead.

Returns whether sky background images are currently displayed.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed.

name: insertSkyLayer
signature: QString insertSkyLayer(StelSkyLayerP layer, QString keyHint, bool show)
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. It is designed for C++ code and may not work reliably in scripts. For adding sky layers from scripts, use `insertSkyImage` or `loadSkyImage` instead.

Adds a new sky layer to the manager.

parameters.name: layer
parameters.description: The sky layer object to insert.

parameters.name: keyHint
parameters.description: Suggested key for referencing the layer later.

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: Initial visibility state of the layer.

returnDescription: Unique reference key for the inserted layer.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed. Use `insertSkyImage` or `loadSkyImage` instead.

example: // Not recommended for scripts. Use insertSkyImage or loadSkyImage instead.

name: insertSkyImage
signature: QString insertSkyImage(QString uri, QString keyHint, bool show, int decimateBy)
description: Loads and inserts a sky image from a URI (URL or local file). The URI should point to a JSON description file or a direct image URL. This is the preferred way to add sky layers from scripts.

parameters.name: uri
parameters.description: URL or local file path to the image or JSON description.

parameters.name: keyHint
parameters.description: Suggested key for referencing the image later.

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: Initial visibility state.

parameters.name: decimateBy
parameters.description: Texture size reduction factor (2, 4, 8) for low-end hardware.

returnDescription: Unique reference key for the inserted image layer.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: loadSkyImage
signature: bool loadSkyImage(QString id, QString filename, double lon0, double lat0, double lon1, double lat1, double lon2, double lat2, double lon3, double lat3, double minRes, double maxBright, bool visible, StelCore::FrameType frameType, bool withAberration, int decimateBy)
description: Loads an image file and projects it onto a quadrilateral region of the sky defined by four corner coordinates. Useful for adding custom astronomical images or overlays.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the image.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Image file path (searched in Stellarium directories).

parameters.name: lon0
parameters.description: Longitude/RA/Azimuth of top-left corner in degrees.

parameters.name: lat0
parameters.description: Latitude/Dec/Altitude of top-left corner in degrees.

parameters.name: lon1
parameters.description: Longitude/RA/Azimuth of bottom-left corner in degrees.

parameters.name: lat1
parameters.description: Latitude/Dec/Altitude of bottom-left corner in degrees.

parameters.name: lon2
parameters.description: Longitude/RA/Azimuth of bottom-right corner in degrees.

parameters.name: lat2
parameters.description: Latitude/Dec/Altitude of bottom-right corner in degrees.

parameters.name: lon3
parameters.description: Longitude/RA/Azimuth of top-right corner in degrees.

parameters.name: lat3
parameters.description: Latitude/Dec/Altitude of top-right corner in degrees.

parameters.name: minRes
parameters.description: Minimum resolution for the image (pixels per degree).

parameters.name: maxBright
parameters.description: Maximum brightness for the image (apparent magnitude).

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: Initial visibility state.

parameters.name: frameType
parameters.description: Coordinate frame (`0` = FrameJ2000, `3` = FrameAltAz, etc.).

parameters.name: withAberration
parameters.description: Apply aberration of light correction.

parameters.name: decimateBy
parameters.description: Texture size reduction factor.

returnDescription: `true` if the image was loaded successfully, `false` otherwise.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use. For scripting, `core.loadSkyImage()` provides a simpler interface.

name: removeSkyLayer
description: Removes a sky layer by its reference key. Use `'*'` to remove all script-added layers.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Reference key of the layer to remove, or `'*'` to remove all removable layers.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: removeSkyLayer (by pointer)
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. It may not work reliably in scripts. Use `removeSkyLayer(QString key)` instead.

Removes a sky layer by its object pointer.

parameters.name: layer
parameters.description: Pointer to the sky layer to remove.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed. Use the string version instead.

example: // Not recommended for scripts. Use removeSkyLayer(key) instead.

name: showLayer
description: Shows or hides a specific sky layer by its identifier.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the layer.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: `true` to show, `false` to hide.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getShowLayer
description: Returns whether a specific sky layer is currently visible.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the layer.

returnDescription: `true` if the layer is visible, `false` otherwise.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getAllSkyLayers
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. It may not work reliably in scripts. Use `getAllKeys()` for a simpler interface.

Returns a map of all currently loaded sky layers, keyed by their identifiers.
returnDescription: Map of layer keys to layer objects.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed.

example: // Not recommended for scripts. Use getAllKeys() instead.

name: getSkyLayer
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. It may not work reliably in scripts.

Returns a sky layer object by its reference key.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Reference key of the layer.

returnDescription: Sky layer object, or null if not found.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed.

example: // Not recommended for scripts. The returned object cannot be used reliably.

name: getAllKeys
description: Returns a list of all currently loaded layer reference keys.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: loadCollection
description: Loads the default deep-sky object texture collection (nebulae images). This is called automatically at startup.

parameters.name: decimateBy
parameters.description: Texture size reduction factor for low-end hardware (e.g., 2, 4, 8).

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.
